description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs all jobs in a single build stage using the registry.gitlab.com/datadrivendiscovery/images/testing:$IMAGE_TAG Docker image (or the primitives image for the test_pipelines job) with a parallel matrix over IMAGE_TAG values ubuntu-bionic-python36, ubuntu-bionic-python37, ubuntu-bionic-python38. Define variables DEPENDENCY_REF=master, GIT_STRATEGY=clone, and GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY=recursive. The git_check job runs before_script git lfs fetch --all then ./git-check.sh; the style_check job runs before_script git lfs fetch --all then pycodestyle $(./list_primitives.py --files); the test_pipelines job runs before_script git lfs fetch --all, git -C /data/datasets show -s, git -C /data/datasets_public show -s, ls -al /data/static_files, then pip3 install --upgrade --upgrade-strategy only-if-needed -e "git+https://gitlab.com/datadrivendiscovery/d3m.git@$DEPENDENCY_REF#egg=d3m", pip3 install -e .[opencv-headless], ./run_pipelines.sh and stores the results directory as an artifact named results-$CI_JOB_ID. The tests and tests_with_optimize jobs each run before_script docker info and git lfs fetch --all, use a docker‑in‑docker service registry.gitlab.com/datadrivendiscovery/images/docker:19-dind with DOCKER_HOST=tcp://docker:2375, install the d3m package and test primitives via pip3, run pip3 check, iterate over primitives with a for loop calling python3 -m d3m primitive describe, then execute ./run_tests.py; the optimized variant also sets PYTHONOPTIMIZE=true. The type_check job runs before_script git lfs fetch --all then pip3 install --upgrade --upgrade-strategy only-if-needed -e "git+https://gitlab.com/datadrivendiscovery/d3m.git@$DEPENDENCY_REF#egg=d3m", pip3 install -e .[opencv-headless], and finally mypy --install-types --non-interactive $(./list_primitives.py --files).
